_doc: Machine-readable selector map for the Skill-6 COMMUNITY / COURSE / CHANNEL builders (F3b: code and doc cannot diverge; the builders load THIS file). Companion prose: SELECTORS-LIVE-community.md + SELECTORS-LIVE-course.md. Anchors are recorded in Playwright getBy* notation and translated to agent-browser 0.27.0 `find`/native-eval calls by ghl_ab_executor.py (fix a).

_status_legend.verified-shared-rail: Confirmed live for forms/surveys on the SAME leadconnectorhq rail, or captured in references/form-click-map.md (global left rail). Cited; safe to act on.
_status_legend.capture-pending: NOT yet LOCKed for this object. D8: NO invented CSS. A REQUIRED capture-pending anchor makes the live builder STOP-and-report until the live capture run (create scratch object -> walk -> record real anchor + conf -> DELETE/deactivate) flips it to 'locked'. An `observed` field records a value SEEN in the 2026-07-10 live-capture attempt (operator template location) but not yet LOCKed via the full capture procedure — Phase B locks it. Fallback-chain is a CAPTURE recipe, not a fact.

_exec_legend.auto: ghl_ab_executor: try `find <locator> <value> click [--name]`, native-eval .click() fallback on a find miss (default).
_exec_legend.native: ghl_ab_executor: go straight to a trusted DOM element.click() via eval. REQUIRED for GHL's Naive-UI submit buttons — proven live that `find ... click`/`click @ref` report Done but do NOT submit; only native .click() fires the create toast.

_capture_contract: Flip a target to status:'locked' ONLY by a live capture run (create a scratch object, walk it, record the real anchor + confidence, DELETE-or-deactivate the object). See the 'capture_procedure' in each SELECTORS-LIVE-*.md.

community_group.evidence: Live capture 2026-07-10: community GROUPS have NO UI delete (row chevron = login-as menu; portal group settings has Details/Subscriptions/Branding/Themes but no Delete/Danger Zone; only an Active<->Inactive status toggle). Tier-1 (36-tool) + Tier-2 (588-tool community MCP) lists have NO delete_community/delete_group/delete_channel — only validate_group_slug (which confirms SLUG keying). Literal 0-residue is IMPOSSIBLE for a group via any known rail; cleanup = set Inactive. NOT a fake delete.
community_group.phase_b: capture the group-settings Active/Inactive toggle anchor to LOCK _deactivate_group.

channel.evidence: No delete_channel on Tier 1/2. The live-capture attempt created a channel but did NOT locate a channel delete/remove control. Channel residue remains inside its (deactivated) group until a real remove primitive is captured.
channel.phase_b: capture the channel remove/delete control (if any) inside the group nav/settings.

course.evidence: Live capture 2026-07-10: each course row has a 'More actions' per-row menu (delete path). Tier-2 community MCP ships create_course/get_course/update_course AND delete_course, delete_course_category, delete_course_post, delete_course_offer, delete_course_product (verified in 36-ghl-mcp-setup/ghl-mcp-setup-full.md tool list). COURSES support true 0-residue delete -> the zero-residue proof is scoped to courses.
course.phase_b: lock the row 'More actions' -> Delete anchors; OPTIONALLY verify the Tier-2 delete_course API is a real endpoint (GHL-LOOKUP-SOP warns community-MCP create/delete tools may be unverified shells) and, per spec §3, let ghl_object_router flip primary if it is real. Router edit is out of Phase-A scope (protected file).

memberships_left_rail.note: Left-rail item is StaticText (like 'Sites') — role=link often absent; getByText is the reliable primary. Cited: references/form-click-map.md global-rail capture; spec §5.

client_portal_dropdown.note: Sites → Client Portal ▾ (spec §5, SELECTORS-LIVE-form.md §2). Communities/courses surface may live under Memberships OR Client Portal — capture confirms which.

builder_save.note: Save is a role+name anchor of conf 9.5 IN THE FORM/SURVEY iframe. Whether the community/course editor is the SAME leadconnectorhq iframe is ASSUMED — capture confirms before trusting.

_idempotency.note: fix b: the communities list has NO search box (live-captured 2026-07-10) — enumerate the rendered group list and match by name/slug via ghl_community_builder._list_has. There is NO list_page.search_box target because none exists.

_identity.note: fix c: after Create the SPA lands on https://<portal_host>/communities/groups/<slug>/home. Groups are keyed by SLUG (no opaque group id in the route; Tier-2 validate_group_slug confirms slug keying). ghl_community_builder._capture_group_identity reads this.

communities_list.observed: 2026-07-10: reached via Memberships sub-nav link 'Communities'; content is in the TOP document under app.convertandflow.com (NOT a cross-origin iframe; the only iframe is the chat widget).
fallbacks: reach via Memberships left-rail → 'Communities' sub-nav link (getByText)
communities_list.note: Never deep-link the builder standalone (spins forever) — reach via SPA nav AFTER a Memberships nav.

group_portal.observed: 2026-07-10: post-create URL on the white-label community portal; group keyed by SLUG (e.g. zhc-capture-probe-c6); default channel 'Announcements'; tabs Discussion/Learning/Events/Leaderboard/Members/About.
fallbacks: read location.href after Create; derive host+slug

create_group_button.observed: 2026-07-10: button 'Create Group' on the list opens a FULL PAGE at /memberships/communities/create-group (NOT a modal).
create_group_button.note: Observed name confirmed live; kept capture-pending until the full create-then-deactivate capture LOCKs it (Phase B).

name_input.observed: 2026-07-10: placeholder 'Group Name' on the create-group page.
fallbacks: getByRole('textbox') labeled Name on the create page

slug_input.observed: 2026-07-10: auto-slug field placeholder 'Group Slug' (usually auto-filled from the name — the slug is the group identity key, fix c).
fallbacks: auto-derived from name; leave default unless a collision

privacy_switch.observed: 2026-07-10: privacy is a switch on the create page (default checked = PUBLIC); settings radios 'Public Group Radio Button' / 'Private Group Radio Button'.
fallbacks: Public/Private radio or switch on the create page
privacy_switch.note: Default is PUBLIC; set Private explicitly when plan.privacy == private.

create_confirm.observed: 2026-07-10: page-confirm button 'Create Group' is a Naive-UI submit — find/@ref click reported Done but did NOT submit; native element.click() fired the 'Group Created ... successfully' toast. exec:native REQUIRED.
fallbacks: native DOM .click() on the 'Create Group' submit

add_channel_control.observed: 2026-07-10: button '+ Add Channel' in the group portal nav.
fallbacks: '+' next to the Channels header (SVG path-d + order)

channel_name_input.observed: 2026-07-10: channel name input placeholder 'e.g Marketing Reports'.

channel_create_confirm.observed: 2026-07-10: channel confirm button 'CREATE CHANNEL' (Naive-UI submit — native .click() path like the group create).

settings_nav.note: Cleanup path (fix d): community has NO delete — only Active<->Inactive. Reach the group Settings, then toggle status_toggle to Inactive.

fallbacks: Active/Inactive status switch in group Settings
status_toggle.note: The ONLY cleanup primitive for a group (no delete anywhere). Toggling to Inactive is the honest 'cleanup'; the group ROW/portal remains (documented residue).

_idempotency.note: fix b: search box no longer a hard dependency; the courses list DOES have a 'Search Courses' box (observed 2026-07-10) usable as an OPTIONAL narrowing step, but idempotency matches the rendered list by name/slug via ghl_community_builder._list_has.

_cleanup.note: fix d: courses are deletable — row 'More actions' menu (UI, observed) and Tier-2 delete_course API. The 0-residue proof is scoped here.

fallbacks: reach via Memberships left-rail → Courses tab (getByText); never deep-link
capture COURSE_ID from location.href OR iframe .src after Create

search_box.observed: 2026-07-10: courses list search box placeholder 'Search Courses'.
search_box.note: OPTIONAL narrowing only (fix b) — idempotency is list-scan; do not hard-require this.

create_course_button.observed: 2026-07-10: create button 'Create New' on the courses list.

row_actions.observed: 2026-07-10: each course row has a 'More actions' per-row menu (courses support delete, unlike groups).

delete_menuitem.note: Courses ARE deletable (fix d) — this is a REAL 0-residue delete, unlike communities.

delete_confirm.note: confirm dialog after the row menu Delete → true 0-residue for courses (fix d).

fallbacks: product-type picker (ASSUMED: courses use the Memberships Products model)
product_type.note: Whether a product-type choice is even presented is ASSUMED — capture.

fallbacks: native DOM .click() on the dialog primary button (Naive-UI submit)
'+' in the outline tree (SVG path-d + order)
add_module.note: GHL calls a module a 'Category' in some builds — capture the real label.

fallbacks: inline title textbox on the new module row
inline title textbox on the new lesson row
CodeMirror/RTE inside the lesson panel — set via .setValue() in-frame, never key-by-key
lesson_body_editor.note: Media is NEVER browser-uploaded — a ghl_media CDN URL is inserted as a link/embed (spec §5.2 content-law).
